ARTICLES OF ASSOCIATION
[Section 5, Companies Act 2013 | Table F of Schedule 1]
OF MANIKANDAN CONSTRUCTIONS PVT LTD
ARIIGLE 1 — IE FREATION
1.1.'Act' means the Companies Act, 2013. ‘Company’ means MANIKANDAN CONSTRUCTIONS PVT LTD.
1.2.'Directors' means the Directors for the time being of the Company.
ARTICLE 2— GARE GARTAL
2.1. Authorized Capital: Rs. 25,00,000/- divided into 2,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each.
2.2. The Company may issue shares at par, at a premium, or at a discount as per the Act.
2.3. Every share shall be distinguished by its appropriate number.
ARIIGLE S— TRANSFER OF SHARES
3.1. Transfer shall be executed by or on behalf of both the transferor and transferee in
writing.
3.2. The Board may, in its absolute discretion, refuse to register any proposed transfer.
3.3. No transfer shall be made to a minor or person of unsound mind.
